violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the ice
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.

CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. The sanitizer in the storage area was reading the correct concentration but the sanitizer bucket in the bar area seemed not to have any sanitizer in it.
